raw_consumer_statement:
XXXXXXXX  Dear Representative, Please protect me from American Express. American Express has repeatedly engaged in intentional deceptive and abusive practices that violate my consumer rights, as evidenced by the following : 1. Conflicting Dispute Timelines : American Express has provided inconsistent information regarding the timeline for my dispute. XXXX  XXXX shows a chat message confirming that my dispute timeline was valid through XX/XX/year>. However, the next week I received an unsigned letter dated XX/XX/year>, stating I had 30 days to provide additional information to support my dispute. 
2. Unreviewed Dispute Closures : On XXXX XX/XX/year>, American Express opened and closed my dispute without conducting a proper review, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. Blocked Online Access : XXXX XXXX  demonstrates how American Express intentionally blocked my account from accessing the online dispute portal, further hindering my ability to resolve the issue. 
4. Billing During Dispute Period : Despite being within the 30-day dispute timeline, American Express billed me for the XX/XX/year>, payment. This is documented in XXXX  XXXX and represents a direct violation of their stated dispute resolution policies. 
These actions by American Express are not isolated incidents but part of a recurring pattern of deceptive practices. Such conduct undermines transparency and accountability, leaving consumers like myself exposed to unfair billing and dispute-handling practices.
